summary: Deterministic section-scoped practical sequencing validation scenarios for the Stage 1 trained baseline.

scenarios.name: tree-chorus-spiral-focus
scenarios.goal: Build a tree-led chorus with flowing motion and clear lead emphasis.
sourceLines: Chorus 1 / TreeRound / shape the chorus using the internal design brief

scenarios.name: arch-directional-segmentation
scenarios.goal: Use the arch as a readable directional support gesture with segmentation.
sourceLines: Verse 1 / ArchSingle / shape the verse using the internal design brief

scenarios.name: spinner-restrained-texture
scenarios.goal: Keep the bridge restrained with textured spinner support instead of large fill motion.
sourceLines: Bridge / SpinnerStandard / shape the bridge using the internal design brief

scenarios.name: star-radial-rotation-accent
scenarios.goal: Use the star as a radial accent with stronger rotation in the final chorus.
sourceLines: Final Chorus / StarSingle / shape the final chorus using the internal design brief
